summary: Software Engineer with a focus on AI/ML systems, data pipelines, and language-aware applications. Experienced in building production-grade backends, semantic search infrastructure, and LLM-powered products. Comfortable across the stack — from GPU clusters to React — with a particular interest in how language models reason and fail.

bullets: Designed and shipped a context-aware RAG pipeline serving 10k+ daily queries at sub-200ms p95 latency.
Reduced embedding index rebuild time by 68% through chunking strategy and incremental upsert logic.
Led evaluation framework for LLM output quality across 5 product verticals; drove prompt iteration cycles.
Mentored 2 junior engineers through biweekly code reviews and architectural walkthroughs.
Built a real-time data pipeline ingesting 2M events/day using Kafka, Flink, and Delta Lake.
Migrated legacy ETL jobs from bash + cron to Airflow DAGs, cutting failure rate from 12% to 0.4%.
Authored internal Python SDK adopted by 8 engineering teams for data access and schema validation.
Partnered with ML team to productionize 3 classifiers (precision ≥ 0.91) via FastAPI microservices.
Built a full-stack admin dashboard (React + Django) for managing ML training job queues.
Implemented a lightweight feature flag system used across 4 internal services by end of internship.

education.degree: M.S. Computer Science — Machine Learning track
education.notes: Thesis: Multilingual Entity Linking in Low-Resource Settings. GPA 3.9.
Gold medalist. Specialisation in Information Security.
